# UlcerBridge workspace instructions

- Build and maintain the UlcerBridge Next.js 14 TypeScript app.
- Preserve the medical dashboard style and role-based patient, doctor, and admin flows.
- Keep the ML endpoint mocked at /api/ml/predict unless the user asks for a real backend.
- Keep self-care plans non-prescriptive.
- Prefer concise changes that compile cleanly.
- Follow development best practices.
